HighDistinction: Critically evaluates AI applications across disciplines synthesising complex perspectives from diverse academic policy and industry sources. Integrates nuanced ethical technical and social considerations.
Distinction: Demonstrates strong critical evaluation and analysis of AI concepts. Engages with diverse perspectives but lacks some depth in synthesis. Strong ethical and policy insights.
Credit: Demonstrates competent research skills applying some critical evaluation. Mostly descriptive with limited depth in evaluating AI’s broader implications.
Pass: Demonstrates basic research and some critical engagement but analysis is superficial. Lacks integration of key scholarly or industry insights.
Fail: Minimal research or analysis. Discussion is descriptive with no critical engagement. Lacks scholarly references and fails to justify claims.

HighDistinction: Constructs original compelling arguments supported by rigorous evidence and advanced reasoning. Anticipates counterarguments and effectively defends key positions.
Distinction: Constructs strong arguments engaging critically with evidence. Some counterarguments addressed but lacks deep rebuttal or synthesis.
Credit: Presents clear arguments but some are underdeveloped or lack depth. Counterarguments are addressed at a surface level.
Pass: Arguments are loosely structured and rely on assertions rather than evidence. Lacks clear engagement with opposing views.
Fail: Arguments are weak incoherent or absent. No evidence or logical structure.

HighDistinction: Communicates complex ideas fluently with high-level professionalism. Uses compelling visuals structured argumentation and engaging delivery.
Distinction: Presentation is clear structured and professional. Some minor weaknesses in delivery visuals or engagement.
Credit: Communicates ideas clearly but lacks fluency or engagement. Some visual or structural inconsistencies.
Pass: Presentation is unclear or unstructured. Visuals are ineffective and delivery is inconsistent
Fail: Poor communication. Presentation is unclear unstructured and disengaging.
